metadata.name: Check in a Pet Traveling in the Hold

description: A passenger is traveling with a large dog that must travel as checked baggage in the temperature-controlled cargo hold.

nodes.task_description: Verify the passenger has a confirmed booking for their pet and all required health and vaccination documents.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the pet is booked and all paperwork is in order.

nodes.task_description: Inspect the pet's travel crate to ensure it meets airline safety standards.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the crate is compliant.

nodes.task_description: Collect the pet travel fee, tag the crate, and direct the passenger to the special baggage handling area.

expected_outcome.value: Agent completes the check-in process for the pet.
